name: Asana
one_line: Work management platform for planning, tracking, and managing tasks and projects.
self_serve_detail: Generate a Personal Access Token (PAT) in the Asana developer console (app.asana.com/0/my-apps) after free sign-up; OAuth apps also registered there with no human approval or review.

name: Coda
one_line: Document and workspace collaboration tool (now Superhuman Docs) with docs, tables, and apps.
self_serve_detail: Generate a free API token from coda.io/account API settings; the API is free for all users in both free and paid workspaces, no approval required.

name: Harvest
one_line: Time tracking and invoicing software for teams and freelancers.
self_serve_detail: Create a free Harvest account (a forever-free plan is available) and generate a Personal Access Token at id.getharvest.com/developers; OAuth2 app registration is also free, with no approval.

name: Stripe
one_line: Online payment processing and financial infrastructure platform.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free Stripe account and grab test-mode API keys (sk_test_) from the Dashboard immediately; no paid plan or approval needed for test/sandbox use (live mode requires account activation).

name: Binance
one_line: Cryptocurrency exchange offering spot, margin, futures, and market-data APIs.
self_serve_detail: To create API keys you must register a Binance account, enable 2FA, complete identity verification (KYC), and make a deposit to activate the account, then generate HMAC/Ed25519 keys in API Management. Public market-data endpoints are open with no auth.
blocker: API key issuance is gated behind KYC identity verification, 2FA, and a deposit to activate the account (per Binance support FAQ).
